title: 30 10 Reactions
wikitext:
[]: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions             Quote Post by Pluto » Mon Mar 08, 2021 8:13 am To those who saw the movie: How did you feel about it? What were some parts that stuck out to you? Third Viewing thoughts SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by WarlikeWolf » Mon Mar 08, 2021 11:36 am Where can I find some spoilers ? Can you tell us what happened in the movie?

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Mar 08, 2021 11:44 am WarlikeWolf wrote: Where can I find some spoilers ?]

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Mon Mar 08, 2021 4:25 pm It reminds me of the LOST finale Satisfying and a feeling of a real end But with unanswered questions that I ain’t fazed about it just simply is what it is! Can’t wait to see it

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Dartz » Mon Mar 08, 2021 5:06 pm I just realised something There'll be no more Service! Service! Service!

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Pluto » Mon Mar 08, 2021 5:40 pm Some overall thoughts (trying to keep spoilers at a minimum): The visual experience on this movie is amazing. When I was watching the opening scene (AVANT1) in the theatre it felt like I was there in the battle with them. The music is amazing! I especially like all of the piano tracks that create the atmosphere. 3.0+1.0 isn't afraid to have fun. There's a cool 70s super robot anime feeling music theme when the wunder battles the dark wonder. There are definitely some great character and emotional beats seeing it in the sense that I felt they were giving a message to fans that you can heal in spite of your sadness and pain. The village scene is VERY Japanese wrt culture. Secrets were revealed. To those who are in Japan and worried about their Japanese skill, if you're familiar with the material, you'll be shocked how much you will understand in this movie. It's like being able to enjoy music even if you're focus isn't on the lyrics. I've read some of the comments in the spoiler thread and it seems a lot of people have read the spoilers but might not have the context. I'm still thinking about the ending, I'm glad we were able to end this story on a happy note. I will be seeing the movie again this weekend and maybe next week as well. I was surprised how accurate intermediate O's predictions were. 3.0+1.0 was like an EoE, you could show your mom. Certainly, if you have any questions, I'll be happy to answer them [edit] Some more thoughts At the beginning Shinji was really emotionally messed up, like EoE level and it's really powerful emotionally to see how he's practically catatonic and the people around him and his friends are showing him kindness. I feel like the first part was to chill you (the fans) out that it was the final movie. So many things I saw I absolutely didn't expect in the best way possible

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Mon Mar 08, 2021 10:55 pm Pluto wrote: 3.0+1.0 was like an EoE, you could show your mom.

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Pluto » Tue Mar 09, 2021 5:58 am Thesufferingpumpkin wrote: It reminds me of the LOST finale Satisfying and a feeling of a real end But with unanswered questions that I ain’t fazed about it just simply is what it is! Can’t wait to see it

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Pluto » Tue Mar 09, 2021 7:25 am Thesufferingpumpkin wrote: To Pluto, Do you think there will be a longer directors cut version in the future?

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by os189 » Tue Mar 09, 2021 10:12 am I've been littering my reactions all over the main thread for over 24 hours. I'm obsessed....this movie is all I can think about since I saw it. Please go over and find what I wrote and see if you agree or disagree with me on the big stuff!

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Pluto » Tue Mar 09, 2021 5:06 pm os189 wrote: I've been littering my reactions all over the main thread for over 24 hours. I'm obsessed....this movie is all I can think about since I saw it. Please go over and find what I wrote and see if you agree or disagree with me on the big stuff!

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Mar 09, 2021 5:41 pm lol, I'm a mod here, and I've even given up on keeping track of everything I've read on that general spoiler thread.

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Heaven Piercing Man » Tue Mar 09, 2021 8:52 pm At this point I can only dream that as part of "handing the reins over", they make more shorts a la Gurren Lagann Parallel Works and we get one detailing the Third Impact in a 3-min artistic montage form like in "All You Bastards Get Fired Up!".

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by BB2K » Tue Mar 09, 2021 11:40 pm i just signed up to post in here because i saw the movie and dont know where else to talk about it lol i dont understand all that much Japanese despite living here too long, but despite all the dialogue i missed, i managed to get a lot, definitely thematically its all ive been able to think about since monday. i wasnt sure what to expect after 3, but i think they really, really knocked this out of the park anything could have happened, and did, and it was all good EoE is my favourite movie ever, and while i still probably think so, this one was really so, so good.

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Pluto » Wed Mar 10, 2021 2:54 am BB2K wrote: i just signed up to post in here because i saw the movie and dont know where else to talk about it lol i dont understand all that much Japanese despite living here too long, but despite all the dialogue i missed, i managed to get a lot, definitely thematically its all ive been able to think about since monday. i wasnt sure what to expect after 3, but i think they really, really knocked this out of the park anything could have happened, and did, and it was all good EoE is my favourite movie ever, and while i still probably think so, this one was really so, so good.

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Mar 10, 2021 6:58 am So I actually saw the movie. And what a movie it is. MEGA  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Pluto » Wed Mar 10, 2021 7:02 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: So I actually saw the movie. And what a movie it is. MEGA  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: 3.0 + 1.0 Reactions [Spoilers]             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Mar 10, 2021 7:05 am The scene with Shinji and Rei where they talk about the world they're in and what the world could be when the title cards for all the TV episodes are flashing in the background... That was an emotional experience. I need to go back and watch again so I can try to catch more of the dialogue, because WOW, there's a lot to unpack and it's all dense.
